마태복음 24:1.content: Jesus went out from the temple, and was going on his way. His disciples came to him to show him the buildings of the temple.

마태복음 24:2.content: But he answered them, “You see all of these things, don’t you? Most certainly I tell you, there will not be left here one stone on another, that will not be thrown down.”

마태복음 24:3.content: As he sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to him privately, saying, “Tell us, when will these things be? What is the sign of your coming, and of the end of the age?”

마태복음 24:4.content: Jesus answered them, “Be careful that no one leads you astray.

마태복음 24:5.content: For many will come in my name, saying, ‘I am the Christ,’ and will lead many astray.

마태복음 24:6.content: You will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you aren’t troubled, for all this must happen, but the end is not yet.

마태복음 24:7.content: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom; and there will be famines, plagues, and earthquakes in various places.

마태복음 24:8.content: But all these things are the beginning of birth pains.

마태복음 24:9.content: Then they will deliver you up to oppression, and will kill you. You will be hated by all of the nations for my name’s sake.

마태복음 24:10.content: Then many will stumble, and will deliver up one another, and will hate one another.

마태복음 24:11.content: Many false prophets will arise, and will lead many astray.

마태복음 24:12.content: Because iniquity will be multiplied, the love of many will grow cold.

마태복음 24:13.content: But he who endures to the end will be saved.

마태복음 24:14.content: This Good News of the Kingdom will be preached in the whole world for a testimony to all the nations, and then the end will come.

마태복음 24:15.content: “When, therefore, you see the abomination of desolation, which was spoken of through Daniel the prophet, standing in the holy place (let the reader understand),

마태복음 24:16.content: then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.

마태복음 24:17.content: Let him who is on the housetop not go down to take out the things that are in his house.

마태복음 24:18.content: Let him who is in the field not return back to get his clothes.

마태복음 24:19.content: But woe to those who are with child and to nursing mothers in those days!

마태복음 24:20.content: Pray that your flight will not be in the winter, nor on a Sabbath,

마태복음 24:21.content: for then there will be great suffering, such as has not been from the beginning of the world until now, no, nor ever will be.

마태복음 24:22.content: Unless those days had been shortened, no flesh would have been saved. But for the sake of the chosen ones, those days will be shortened.

마태복음 24:23.content: “Then if any man tells you, ‘Behold, here is the Christ,’ or, ‘There,’ don’t believe it.

마태복음 24:24.content: For there will arise false christs, and false prophets, and they will show great signs and wonders, so as to lead astray, if possible, even the chosen ones.

마태복음 24:26.content: If therefore they tell you, ‘Behold, he is in the wilderness,’ don’t go out; or ‘Behold, he is in the inner rooms,’ don’t believe it.

마태복음 24:27.content: For as the lightning flashes from the east, and is seen even to the west, so will the coming of the Son of Man be.

마태복음 24:28.content: For wherever the carcass is, that is where the vultures gather together.

마태복음 24:29.content: But immediately after the suffering of those days, the sun will be darkened, the moon will not give its light, the stars will fall from the sky, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken;

마태복음 24:30.content: and then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in the sky. Then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of the sky with power and great glory.

마태복음 24:31.content: He will send out his angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they will gather together his chosen ones from the four winds, from one end of the sky to the other.

마태복음 24:32.content: “Now from the fig tree learn this parable. When its branch has now become tender, and produces its leaves, you know that the summer is near.

마태복음 24:33.content: Even so you also, when you see all these things, know that it is near, even at the doors.

마태복음 24:34.content: Most certainly I tell you, this generation will not pass away, until all these things are accomplished.

마태복음 24:35.content: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.

마태복음 24:36.content: But no one knows of that day and hour, not even the angels of heaven, but my Father only.

마태복음 24:37.content: “As the days of Noah were, so will the coming of the Son of Man be.

마태복음 24:38.content: For as in those days which were before the flood they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day that Noah entered into the ship,

마태복음 24:39.content: and they didn’t know until the flood came, and took them all away, so will the coming of the Son of Man be.

마태복음 24:40.content: Then two men will be in the field: one will be taken and one will be left.

마태복음 24:41.content: Two women will be grinding at the mill: one will be taken and one will be left.

마태복음 24:42.content: Watch therefore, for you don’t know in what hour your Lord comes.

마태복음 24:43.content: But know this, that if the master of the house had known in what watch of the night the thief was coming, he would have watched, and would not have allowed his house to be broken into.

마태복음 24:44.content: Therefore also be ready, for in an hour that you don’t expect, the Son of Man will come.

마태복음 24:45.content: “Who then is the faithful and wise servant, whom his lord has set over his household, to give them their food in due season?

마태복음 24:46.content: Blessed is that servant whom his lord finds doing so when he comes.

마태복음 24:47.content: Most certainly I tell you that he will set him over all that he has.

마태복음 24:48.content: But if that evil servant should say in his heart, ‘My lord is delaying his coming,’

마태복음 24:49.content: and begins to beat his fellow servants, and eat and drink with the drunkards,

마태복음 24:50.content: the lord of that servant will come in a day when he doesn’t expect it, and in an hour when he doesn’t know it,

마태복음 24:51.content: and will cut him in pieces, and appoint his portion with the hypocrites. That is where the weeping and grinding of teeth will be.
